name: KOI Content Extension
description: Parsing rules, modeling rules, playbooks and a dashboard that extend the Palo Alto Networks KOI Marketplace content pack (pack "KOI", integration id KOI, v1.2.3 or later). This pack ships no integration and no commands of its own: it normalizes and models the koi_koi_raw dataset produced by the installed KOI integration, and adds investigation and response playbooks built strictly against that integration's 13 commands. The KOI pack must be installed first.
author: Ayman Mahmoud

CortexXDR.display_name: Cortex XDR by Palo Alto Networks
